header.class: false sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-gray-200 bg-white

button.class: group flex items-center space-x-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-primary
group flex items-center space-x-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-primary
group flex items-center space-x-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-primary

a.class: text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-primary bg-[#FCFCFC] px-8 py-2 border border-[#E1E1E2] rounded-md
rounded-md bg-primary px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-primary/90

button.class: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md p-2 text-gray-700 md:hidden

div.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-screen px-4

div.p: We’re sorry, the page you have looked for does not exist in our database! Maybe go to our home page or try to use a search?

a.class: mt-[26px] bg-[#0094FC] text-white font-medium flex items-center justify-center px-[16px] sm:px-[21.87px] py-[16px] sm:py-[20.78px] rounded-[10px] block

div.class: fixed right-0 top-0 h-full flex items-center z-50

button.class: bg-red-600 text-white px-2 py-6 capitalize font-medium tracking-wide text-center fixed right-0 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 z-50 text-sm sm:text-base

footer.class: bg-white py-16 text-gray-900 font-light relative false

div.span:
14160 N Dallas Parkway, Suite 760
Dallas TX 75254

body.title: LightForth: Land Your Dream Job Faster with Our Tool

meta.name: description
meta.content: Land your dream job faster with LightForth's smart resume builder, automated job applications, and tailored interview prep tools.
